verdicts.note: The dossier documents dedicated, continued, or restored emergency-service operations but no service expansion, new staffing, or capital project sufficient to locate the measure on invest-and-expand versus audit-and-restrain.

The dossier documents dedicated, continued, or restored emergency-service operations but no service expansion, new staffing, or capital project sufficient to locate the measure on invest-and-expand versus audit-and-restrain.

review_notes: All six original lean mappings and all three display records were reviewed. Tax strength correctly distinguishes renewals from restorations, new excess levies, and debt. Operational funding alone does not resolve the spending axis; the South Beach replacement-station bond is a documented major capital investment.
